response:
Emily gathered twenty-four blue fruits while David picked fifteen additional ones to reach thirty-nine total berries.
***
Sophia collected thirteen since David held three times her amount and the group pooled all their harvest together.
***
Sixty-one berries allowed them to bake six full batches of muffins using nine fruits per single batch for sale.
***
Selling six batches at five dollars each earned thirty dollars for the hardworking youth.
